name: Fitness Tracker
description: A PWA for tracking weekly workouts across strength, cardio, mobility, and mindfulness — built for our whole family of four. Multi-user, real-time Firebase sync, AI-powered goal setting with a physiology-informed dashboard, ACWR load monitoring, and streak tracking. Live at fitness.vargo.city.

name: Sierra Pulse
description: A living portrait of the Sierra Nevada, updated daily. Synthesizes snowpack, streamflow, weather, fire, road access, Strava trail traffic, and permit availability into a single decision-support view for backcountry travelers — flagging the moment when conditions, air quality, and logistics align.

name: Bread Planner
description: A baking scheduler for sourdough and naturally leavened breads. Enter your desired bake time and it works backwards through fermentation, shaping, and proofing to tell you exactly when to start.

name: FridgeCal
description: Photograph the family whiteboard and it parses the shorthand — OTF, CCT, Bay City basketball — and pushes the week's events straight to Google Calendar. Built for the fridge calendar, which actually runs the household.

name: Gratitude Text App
description: A family SMS service for building a daily gratitude practice together. Sends a rotating morning prompt, collects replies, tracks streaks, and cheers milestones — all over text, no app required.

name: Strava Print
description: Pulls GPS and elevation data from Strava and exports it as a 3D-printable STL. The primary form is a descent asymmetry object — a tent-shaped solid where the front face encodes gradient on the climb and the back face encodes speed on the descent. Mountain routes have a narrative arc; this tries to make that arc holdable.

name: Campsite Dashboard
description: A planning dashboard for backcountry camping trips — tracking permits, gear checklists, and route data.
